name: tiny-coerce
description: Tiny coercion library for Client or Server

scripts.build: npm run lint && rm -rf dist && npm run rollup
scripts.fix: oxlint --fix *.js src tests && oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --write
scripts.lint: oxlint *.js src tests && oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --check
scripts.types: npx -p typescript tsc src/coerce.js --declaration --allowJs --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir types && rm types/constants.d.ts && rm types/regex.d.ts
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run mocha

author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>
